metadata.title: Torre Médica La Carolina | Machala
metadata.description: Medical specialists directory in Machala, Ecuador. Book via WhatsApp.

hero.title: Medical specialists, all in one place
hero.description: Book your appointment directly via WhatsApp — no middlemen, no waiting. Torre Médica La Carolina brings together the best specialists in Machala.

howto.title: Booking is this simple
howto.step1Desc: Browse the directory and find the professional you need.
howto.step2Desc: Contact the office directly with a single tap.
howto.step3Desc: The doctor's team confirms your available date and time.

specialties.title: Featured specialties
specialties.description: A quick look at the medical areas available in the tower.

doctors.title: Doctor directory
doctors.description: Every card includes a direct WhatsApp call to action for booking or first contact.
